name: presecurity
description: Markdown-first security review plugin that reads, analyzes, reports, and applies safe autofixes for general codebases.

interface.shortDescription: Read, analyze, report, and safe-autofix security issues.
interface.longDescription: presecurity is a Markdown-first security review plugin for Codex. It borrows the artifact discipline of Codex Security while staying local-first and lightweight: read the codebase, build a threat model, produce report artifacts, and apply only safe deterministic fixes.
